title: Hiring Medical Officer at Shroff Eye Centre

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Shroff Eye Centre
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
